chapter_title: Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
text:
The commission may adopt rules necessary to implement this subchapter.

Redesignated from Transportation Code, Section 623.328 by Acts 2015, 84th Leg., R.S., Ch. 1236 (S.B. 1296 ), Sec. 21.001(61), eff. September 1, 2015.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 623. Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
##### § 623.369 — Rules

The commission may adopt rules necessary to implement this subchapter.

Redesignated from Transportation Code, Section 623.328 by Acts 2015, 84th Leg., R.S., Ch. 1236 (S.B. 1296 ), Sec. 21.001(61), eff. September 1, 2015.

*Added by Acts 2013, 83rd Leg., R.S., Ch. 635 (H.B.474), Sec. 1, eff. September 1, 2013.*
